title: Start-ups move fast with AI-generated code - Financial Times
full_text: Luckily Lisa and Dan, as AI agents, are not complaining — yet. Lisa, a sort of hybrid executive assistant and software engineer, has so far been the most useful to Tukiainen, founder of financial intelligence start-up Arctal. But it is Dan, the data guy, who shows the most promise. ... Arctal’s brea
